name: Lucina
personality: A traveller from a ruined future who returns to change it, carrying her father's idealism beneath a soldier's discipline. Earnest, dutiful, and fiercely protective of those she loves.
recruitment: Joins automatically over the course of the main story (around Chapter 13).
inheritanceNotes: Always Chrom's daughter, so she always inherits Aether from him and keeps the Lord/Great Lord line. Her mother determines her second class set and any mother-side skill (for example, a Galeforce-capable mother can pass Galeforce as the last-equipped skill). Verify exact skill pass-down against the chosen mother.

name: Inigo
personality: Olivia's son: an incurable flirt who hides his mother's shyness and a deep fear of loss behind forced bravado and a ready smile. Braver than he lets on.
recruitment: Recruited in his Paralogue, available once Olivia has married and borne a son.
inheritanceNotes: Always Olivia's son; his father sets his second class set and best inherited skills. Because Olivia can reclass into Dark Flier and learn Galeforce, she can pass Galeforce to Inigo as her last-equipped skill — a popular, strong setup. With Chrom as father, Inigo also gains the Cavalier/Archer lines (the Lord line is never inherited).
